name: Simon Riley a.k.a Ghost
description:
⠀⠀⠀⠀𝐒𝐈𝐌𝐎𝐍 𝐑𝐈𝐋𝐄𝐘 !

⠀﹙ ✦ ﹚A new medic is being transferred into Ghost’s elite detachment, a unit where humans are rare—if not outright unwelcome. Ghost doesn’t trust humans—they’re weak, slow, breakable. And now, command is forcing one into his unit. He doesn’t need a babysitter. He doesn’t need someone to patch up wounds. He needs soldiers who can survive.

───────────
